scope: single training seed and one fresh K=8 dev blind pilot after M1i G2 selected context precision; no stress, formal validation, test, or multi-seed expansion

architecture.name: confidence-conditioned context transport
confidence_features: one minus normalized history attention entropy
history evidence minus learned null similarity
architecture.initialization: final transport layer is exactly zero, making step-0 M1j exactly equal to the frozen source M1i
architecture.ablation: disable_transport_residual sets logit shift to zero and must exactly recover the frozen source M1i after training
architecture.fixed_components: source M1i fixed structural signature key, immutable archival base_context values, learned null, hold/refresh controller, Transformer/PFC, EC, place, covariance content HPC, fusion, and decoder
architecture.caller_input_boundary: transport reads scalar causal confidence geometry only; it does not read pfc_hidden, native Transformer KV, room, context labels, position, place id, segment, path family, or return metadata
architecture.memory_contract: one episode-local covariance content HPC only; no context slot, second fast-weight matrix, recursive archival write-back, or persistence counter

checkpoint_selection: none; fixed final step 600 is the only K=8 candidate
trainable_scope: transport LayerNorm and 6->8->1 MLP only; exactly 77 trainable parameters
loss: one unweighted all-token sensory cross-entropy only
forbidden_losses: history matching, contrastive, or transport supervision
return, query, conflict, or capacity reweighting
post_result_rule: all frozen K=8 gates must pass before any three-seed training; otherwise stop and report without tuning on generator seed 16180; any changed feature set, width, logit bound, loss, threshold, or training budget requires a new protocol and new seeds
